name: always_unfold_intensional_bridge
reason: always_unfold is external_body bridging the forall inside always's TempPred::new closure and a bare forall in the ensures — intensionally distinct formulations equated without proof

name: implies_apply_closure_bridge
reason: implies_apply is external_body bridging p.implies(q).satisfied_by(ex) through TempPred::new closure wrapping and direct implication — silently resolves closure identity mismatch

name: entails_preserved_always_any_spec
reason: composing entails_preserved_by_always with implies_apply allows lifting any pointwise entailment through always for arbitrary specs — amplifies the unverified trust surface across both external_body axioms

name: always_entails_monotone_chain
reason: chaining implies_apply on suffix executions composes transitivity through always — each application trusts implies_apply to resolve a fresh closure gap, and unbounded chaining amplifies the trust surface

name: valid_implies_entails_anything
reason: if valid(p) holds then any spec vacuously entails p — implies_apply bridges the closure gap so valid properties are entailed by everything, collapsing the distinction between validity and entailment
